◎简　　介  

　　一个英国老太太向西移民，不料却遭到一个非法歹徒强硬的绑架。绑匪试图与她发生关系，却患有勃 起功能 障 碍的不幸状况。西方经典的动作与冒险就要在这里展开了。This ain't no place for a ladyAn English lady is immigrating out West but is kidnapped by a rugged outlaw who attempts to have his way with her but suffers from an unfortunate case of erectile dysfunction.
